/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.0.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=14.5 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/spatialroot_realtime.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o spatialroot_realtime  libEngineSessionCore.a ../../../allolib-build/libcult_allolib_spatial.a ../../../allolib-build/libcult_allolib_audio.a ../../../allolib-build/external/rtaudio/librtaudio.a -framework CoreAudio -framework CoreFoundation ../../../allolib-build/libcult_allolib_params.a ../../../allolib-build/libcult_allolib_file.a ../../../allolib-build/libcult_allolib_osc.a ../../../allolib-build/libcult_allolib_core.a ../../../allolib-build/external/liboscpack.a ../../../allolib-build/external/Gamma/lib/libGamma.a ../../../libsndfile-build/libsndfile.a -lm
